replies.msg:
Have your Kanto Form hold an everstone, even if it has the wrong nature. Now find a Pokemon within your Kanto Forms' Egg Group with the right Nature and have it hold an everstone as well. You will have to give up the use of a Destiny Knot for a bit, but you now have 50/50 chance of inheriting either Nature. Keep in mind though, if you are using a Ditto for this part the Kanto Form HAS TO BE FEMALE! If it's male the eggs will just contain Alolan Forms.

所以只要阿媽係關東代就可以
